description_long: This object consists of two horizontally oriented banners, each supported by a pair of sturdy vertical posts at either end. The banners themselves are rectangular and feature a light blue background with visible text and simple graphic elements, likely in an East Asian script. The posts appear to be made of a solid material, possibly wood or metal, and are capped at the top for added stability. The banners are framed within the posts, giving the structure a freestanding and robust appearance suitable for outdoor use. The overall design is functional and clear, intended to display information or announcements in a public space. The banners are positioned parallel to each other, suggesting they may serve as entry markers or informational signs along a pathway or street.
description: A pair of horizontally oriented banners with text and graphics, each supported by vertical posts at both ends, designed for outdoor public display.
description_view_0: Front view showing both banners with visible text and graphics, supported by vertical posts at each end.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the banners and the depth of the supporting posts.
description_view_2: Rear view of the banners, showing the back side of the text panels and the supporting posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the structure of the posts.
